---
title: "R Package Development"
description: "Package structure, roxygen2, testthat, pkgdown, CRAN submission."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
<span data-topic-count="r-package-development"></span> TUTORIALS
:::

# R Package Development

Package structure, roxygen2, testthat, pkgdown, CRAN submission.
